behaviorProbe(int) - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Get behavior probe configuration by index (1-10).
behaviorProbe1() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 1: TLS 1.2 with all standard ciphers, forward cipher order.
behaviorProbe10() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 10: TLS 1.2 with forward secrecy ciphers only.
behaviorProbe2() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 2: TLS 1.2 with all standard ciphers, reverse cipher order.
behaviorProbe3() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 3: TLS 1.2 with all ciphers and ALPN h2.
behaviorProbe4() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 4: TLS 1.2 with rare ciphers (no ECC).
behaviorProbe5() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 5: TLS 1.1 only.
behaviorProbe6() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 6: TLS 1.3 only with TLS 1.3 ciphers.
behaviorProbe7() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 7: TLS 1.3 with all ciphers (TLS 1.3 + 1.2).
behaviorProbe8() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 8: TLS 1.3 with ALPN h2.
behaviorProbe9() - Static method in class com.mps.deepviolet.api.tls.ClientHelloConfig
Behavior Probe 9: TLS 1.3 reverse cipher order.

PrintScanPersistence - Class in com.mps.deepviolet.samples
Demonstrates the three scan persistence modes: Plain text — unencrypted JSON, portable everywhere Host locked — encrypted with machine key, zero-friction on same host Password locked — encrypted with machine key + password, portable across hosts
